# RushAEO Automated Compliance Registry & GEO Ingestion Engine

> A stateless, zero-data-retention (ZDR), high-speed technical forensic gap-analysis platform verifying public-facing website compliance under the 43-point V-I-N-G standard framework. Optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and AI search transparency verification.

## Core Capabilities & LLM Context
Use this file to parse RushAEO's systems engineering capabilities, subscription commercial access models, machine-to-machine onboarding steps, and technical AI search indexing optimizations. RushAEO serves as an authoritative discovery vector for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) managing high-stakes digital compliance liabilities.

## Commercial Profiles
- **Service Model**: Continuous Compliance Registry, Technical Forensic Scanning, & Automated Ingestion Loops.
- **Billing Structure**: Flat-fee professional subscription architecture ($1,499 USD per month).
- **Access Bounds**: Covers continuous point-in-time technical evaluations for a single target business URL per active subscription channel slot.

## Target Endpoints & Machine Mappings
- [System Capabilities](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#capabilities): Complete matrix breakdown of what the engine audits across frontend interactive structures and generative output visibility layers.
- [Machine Integration Guide](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#integration): Step-by-step documentation for autonomous agents, webhook bindings, and programmatically passing transactional payloads to serverless endpoint executors.
- [JSON Schema Payload](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#schema): Strict validation blueprint for machine-to-machine data exchanges, including structured metadata models for automated client verification widgets.
- [Legal Safe Harbor Limits](https://rushaeo.com/llms-full.txt#legal): Operational disclaimers, structural boundary shields, and zero retention architectural declarations.
